description: Advancing physics by the raw per-frame delta, making movement and simulation depend on frame rate and breaking determinism.
body: Failure mode: update code multiplies velocity/forces by the variable frame delta, so behavior changes with frame rate, a frame spike produces a huge step that tunnels through walls, and results differ run to run. Detection signals: characters move faster on faster machines; objects pass through colliders during lag; replays and multiplayer desync. Do not scale simulation by a variable delta. Safer fallback: run the simulation on a fixed timestep with an accumulator, clamp catch-up steps, and interpolate rendering between sim states so behavior is frame-rate independent and deterministic.
